  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AcknowledgeRequest
    Data Transfer Object (DTO) used to represent an acknowledgment request.
    AdminController
    REST controller for admin-only user and organization management.
    AdminCreateOrganizationRequest
    Request body for creating a new organization with an initial admin user.
    AdminCreateUserRequest
    Request body for creating a new user within an organization.
    AdminService
    Service class for admin user and organization management.
    AdminToggleActiveRequest
    Request body for toggling the active status of a user account.
    AdminUpdateRoleRequest
    Request body for updating the role of an existing user.
    AlcoholLog
    Entity representing an alcohol compliance log entry.
    AlcoholLogController
    REST controller for alcohol compliance log operations.
    AlcoholLogRepository
    Repository for AlcoholLog entities.
    AlcoholLogRequest
    Request body used when creating a new alcohol log entry.
    AlcoholLogResponse
    Response body representing a single alcohol log entry.
    AlcoholLogService
    Service class for alcohol compliance log operations.
    AlcoholLogType
    Enumeration representing different types of alcohol compliance log entries.
    ApplicationConfig
    Application security configuration class.
    AuthenticationController
    REST controller for authentication endpoints.
    AuthenticationRequest
    Request body for the login endpoint.
    AuthenticationResponse
    Response body returned after successful registration or login.
    AuthenticationService
    Service class handling user registration and authentication.
    Certification
    Entity representing a certification issued to a user.
    CertificationRepository
    Repository for Certification entities.
    Checklist
    Entity representing a checklist within the system.
    ChecklistController
    REST controller for checklist management and completion.
    ChecklistItem
    Entity representing a single item within a checklist.
    ChecklistItemRepository
    Repository for ChecklistItem entities.
    ChecklistRepository
    Repository for Checklist entities.
    ChecklistRequest
    Request body used when creating a new checklist.
    ChecklistService
    Service class for checklist management and completion.
    CreateQuizQuestionRequest
    Data Transfer Object (DTO) used when creating a new quiz question.
    DataInitializer
    Initializes the database with test data on application startup.
    Deviation
    Entity representing a deviation within the system.
    DeviationController
    REST controller for deviation reporting and management.
    DeviationModule
    Enumeration representing the module or domain area where a deviation occurred.
    DeviationRepository
    Repository for Deviation entities.
    DeviationRequest
    Request body used when reporting a new deviation.
    DeviationService
    Service class for deviation report management.
    DeviationStatus
    Enumeration representing the lifecycle status of a deviation.
    DocumentAcknowledgement
    Entity representing a user's acknowledgement of a training document.
    DocumentAcknowledgementRepository
    Repository for DocumentAcknowledgement entities.
    EmployeeOptionResponse
    Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a simplified employee option.
    Equipment
    Entity representing equipment used within an organization.
    EquipmentController
    REST controller for equipment management.
    EquipmentRepository
    Repository for Equipment entities.
    EquipmentResponse
    Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing equipment details.
    EquipmentService
    Service class for equipment retrieval.
    Frequency
    Enumeration representing how often a task or checklist should be performed.
    FsV26Application
    Entry point for the Checkd Spring Boot application.
    GlobalExceptionHandler
    Global exception handler for all REST controllers.
    JwtAuthenticationFilter
    JWT authentication filter that processes incoming HTTP requests.
    JwtService
    Service class for creating, parsing, and validating JSON Web Tokens (JWT).
    ModuleType
    Enumeration representing different operational modules within the system.
    OpenApiConfig
    Configuration class for OpenAPI (Swagger) documentation.
    Organization
    Entity representing an organization within the system.
    OrganizationRepository
    Repository for Organization entities.
    PracticalSignOffRequest
    Data Transfer Object (DTO) used to request a practical sign-off for an employee.
    PracticalTrainingSignOff
    Entity representing a practical training sign-off for a user.
    PracticalTrainingSignOffRepository
    Repository for PracticalTrainingSignOff entities.
    QuizSubmissionRequest
    Data Transfer Object (DTO) used when submitting answers to a quiz.
    RateLimitingService
    Service for applying rate limiting based on client IP addresses.
    RegisterRequest
    Request body for the user registration endpoint.
    ReportController
    REST controller for compliance report generation.
    ReportResponse
    Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a generated report.
    ReportService
    Service class for compliance report generation.
    ReportSummaryDto
    Data Transfer Object (DTO) containing summarized report statistics.
    ResourceConflictException
    Exception thrown when a request results in a resource conflict.
    ResourceNotFoundException
    Exception thrown when a requested resource cannot be found.
    Role
    Enumeration representing user roles within the system.
    SecurityConfig
    Main Spring Security configuration class.
    TemperatureController
    REST controller for temperature logging and monitoring.
    TemperatureLog
    Entity representing a temperature measurement log.
    TemperatureLogRepository
    Repository for TemperatureLog entities.
    TemperatureService
    Service class for temperature logging and monitoring.
    TrainingAttempt
    Entity representing a user's attempt at completing a training quiz or assessment.
    TrainingAttemptRepository
    Repository for TrainingAttempt entities.
    TrainingCompletionType
    Enumeration representing how a training document must be completed.
    TrainingController
    REST controller for training document and certification management.
    TrainingDocument
    Entity representing a training document within the system.
    TrainingDocumentRepository
    Repository for TrainingDocument entities.
    TrainingDocumentType
    Enumeration representing the type of training document.
    TrainingQuizQuestion
    Entity representing a quiz question belonging to a training document.
    TrainingQuizQuestionRepository
    Repository for TrainingQuizQuestion entities.
    TrainingQuizResultResponse
    Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing the result of a completed training quiz.
    TrainingService
    Service class for training document and certification management.
    TrainingStatusResponse
    Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing the training status of a document.
    User
    Entity representing a user in the system.
    UserRepository
    Repository for User entities.
